pulse: The healthcare sector currently trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 15.1x and a P/E ratio of 25.2x, both of which align closely with broader market averages. Notably, AstraZeneca (AZN) recently maintained its full-year forecasts as its oncology and cardiovascular drugs drove robust earnings, reflecting the sector's ongoing strength amidst recent commentary on drug demand and hospital utilization. As pharma companies gear up for earnings reports, investors should watch for potential upward momentum in stock prices, particularly for firms like Merck KGaA (MRK) that demonstrated solid results, signaling a favorable environment for healthcare investments in 2026.
